title: Preparing ETS2 for Launch: Why Integrity and Clarity Matter [Promoted Content]
summary_full: As the EU prepares for the launch of ETS2 in 2028, this article examines the importance of market integrity, regulatory clarity, and coordinated implementation in ensuring a credible and effective carbon market for buildings, road transport, and additional sectors across Europe.
